description: Search LOC digital collections, Chronicling America newspapers (full OCR), and LC Subject Headings.
name: io.github.cyanheads/libofcongress-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: User-Agent header sent with LOC API requests. LOC recommends a descriptive value for polite access.
environmentVariables.name: LOC_USER_AGENT

environmentVariables.description: Delay in milliseconds between LOC API requests to stay under the 20 req/min rate limit.
environmentVariables.name: LOC_REQUEST_DELAY_MS

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
